Dio.r Mini Book tote
A retro and stylish statement piece♡Exquisite embroidery craftsmanship perfectly presented, adding a highlight to your outfit with just a casual carry~ This mini size is so adorable8! Fits an iPad Air 4 or an iPad Pro 11
